idea-plugin.name: SQL Dialect for Apache Doris
idea-plugin.description:
Apache Doris SQL dialect and data-source support for DataGrip and IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate.

  • Dedicated DorisSQL dialect with correct statement and run-block boundaries for Doris syntax the generic MySQL dialect mis-parses: INSERT OVERWRITE, SELECT * EXCEPT(...), QUALIFY, CREATE JOB, materialized views, DISTRIBUTED BY / PROPERTIES DDL, REFRESH, WARM UP, and more
  • Window functions, CTEs, Doris cast targets (STRING, LARGEINT, ARRAY<...>, MAP<...>), TRY_CAST, and map access (col['key']) parse with full structure and completion
  • Completion for 825 Doris built-in functions and Doris data types (VARIANT, BITMAP, HLL, AGG_STATE, ...)
  • Doris-accurate syntax validation via an embedded build of the Doris SQL parser
  • Ready-to-use Apache Doris data-source template: MySQL Connector/J download, default port 9030, connection validation, SHOW CREATE definitions

This is an independent, community plugin developed by Sortdev SRL. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the Apache Software Foundation. "Apache Doris", Doris, and the Doris logo are trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation, used here only to identify the database this plugin supports. For the official project see doris.apache.org.

Source, issues and documentation: github.com/sort-dev/doris-intellij-plugin
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.3 — first public release.
  • DorisSQL dialect on the MySQL foundation with correct statement/run-block boundaries for Doris-specific syntax
  • Native parsing for window functions, IF(), CTE chains, and INSERT OVERWRITE pipelines
  • SELECT * EXCEPT(...), Doris cast targets, TRY_CAST, and REGEXP(...) handled without breaking resolution or completion
  • 825-function completion, Doris data types, Doris-accurate error checking
  • Apache Doris driver template with automatic MySQL Connector/J download
